item.title: Various Interests
item.description: Consume Books Currently reading: A Short History of Nearly Everything by Bill Bryson The Willpower Instinct: How Self-Control Works, Why It Matters, and What You Can Do to Get More of It by Kelly McGonigal Recently read: Breakneck: China’s Quest to Engineer the Future by Dan Wang · ★★★★☆ — Really so...

item.title: All Opinions are My Own
item.description: My Articles Building a Note-Taking System That Actually Works 2026-03-18 · kareem.cloud The author argues that effective notetaking systems are highly personal and emergent from individual experimentation rather than following universal best practices—successful systems combine techniques from vario...

item.title: Digital Cloud
item.description: Welcome to my Digital Cloud — a living collection of ideas, notes, and connected thoughts.

item.title: Kareem Abdol-Hamid
item.description: Welcome to my digital cloud → ideas, tech, and me. Currently: Sr.

item.title: Developing a Note Taking Systems
item.description: Transclude of cloud Insight or Idea Background Note-taking and writing have many frameworks and some are going to work better for other people.
